name: Q2 Digital Banking Platform REST API
what_it_does: Q2 digital banking platform REST API for community banks, credit unions, and regional financial institutions to build and extend digital banking experiences — including account management, payments, transfers, user authentication, and financial wellness tools — through Q2's open banking platform and Q2 Innovation Studio SDK. Enables AI agents to manage account for digital banking account balance and transaction automation, handle payment for ACH and wire transfer initiation automation, access user for digital banking user profile and authentication automation, retrieve transaction history for personal finance management data automation, manage notification for banking alert and push notification automation, handle budgeting for financial wellness and spending analysis automation, access card for debit card management and control automation, retrieve loan for lending product and application status automation, manage customer for banking relationship and KYC data automation, and integrate Q2 with core banking (Fiserv, Jack Henry, FIS) and fintech partners through Q2 Partner Marketplace for community bank digital innovation automation.
use_cases: Building digital banking features for community banks and credit unions through Q2 Innovation Studio automation agents
Extending digital banking with fintech integrations via Q2 Partner Marketplace automation agents
Automating payment initiation and account management for business banking customers automation agents
Retrieving account and transaction data for personal financial management within Q2 platform automation agents
not_for: Large national banks (Q2 targets community banks and credit unions, not tier-1 banks)
Direct consumer banking (Q2 is a platform for banks to serve their customers, not direct consumer API)
General payment processing (Q2 is digital banking platform, not standalone payment gateway)
best_when: A community bank, credit union, or regional financial institution using Q2 digital banking platform wanting AI agents to extend digital banking capabilities, automate financial operations, and integrate fintech partners through Q2's open banking Innovation Studio.
avoid_when: Q2 CUSTOMER REQUIRED: Q2 API access requires being a Q2 platform customer (financial institution); automated open developer access assumption creates no_access without Q2 financial institution contract; automated must be a Q2 customer financial institution. INNOVATION STUDIO SDK IS THE INTEGRATION PATH: Q2 extensions are built via Innovation Studio SDK, not raw REST; automated generic REST assumption creates integration mismatch without Innovation Studio framework; automated must use Q2 Innovation Studio patterns. CORE BANKING SYNC TIMING: Q2 syncs with core banking systems (FIS, Fiserv) on batch cycles; automated real-time core data assumption creates delayed_balance for non-real-time cores; automated must account for core banking sync intervals. FINANCIAL INSTITUTION BRANDING REQUIRED: Q2 platform presents under each financial institution's brand; automated Q2-branded assumption creates incorrect UX for financial institution end users; automated must respect financial institution branding within Q2 platform.

auth.notes: Q2 uses OAuth2 for digital banking REST API. REST API with JSON. Austin, TX HQ. Founded 2004 by Matthew Flake. NYSE:QTWO. Products: Q2 Digital Banking, Q2 Innovation Studio, Q2 Open (marketplace), Q2 Catalyst (lending), Q2 SMART (fraud). ~450+ financial institution customers. 20M+ digital banking users. Core integrations: Fiserv, Jack Henry, FIS. Competes with nCino, Backbase, and Temenos for community bank digital banking platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via Innovation Studio for Q2 customers; production requires Q2 financial institution license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription per financial institution; per-user fees; Innovation Studio partner fees; professional services
pricing.notes: Austin TX. NYSE:QTWO. Annual subscription. Community banking platform. 450+ FI customers. 20M+ users.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; banking APIs throttled per financial institution tier

known_agent_gotchas: INNOVATION STUDIO IS REQUIRED INTEGRATION FRAMEWORK: Q2 extensions must be built using Innovation Studio SDK pattern; automated raw REST assumption creates integration failure without SDK wrapper; automated must implement Q2 Innovation Studio extension pattern

CORE BANKING BATCH CYCLES AFFECT DATA FRESHNESS: Q2 syncs with core banking on overnight/batch cycles; automated real-time balance assumption creates stale_balance for users checking mid-day; automated must communicate core sync timing to users

FINANCIAL INSTITUTION CONTEXT IS REQUIRED: All Q2 API calls require financial institution context; automated context-free API assumption creates missing_fi_context error; automated must pass financial institution identifier with every API call

PCI SCOPE INCLUDES Q2 LAYER: Payments through Q2 involve PCI-DSS scoping; automated PCI-ignorant payment assumption creates compliance risk; automated must ensure PCI-DSS compliance for payment data passing through Q2

PARTNER MARKETPLACE VETTING REQUIRED: Q2 Partner Marketplace integrations require Q2 vetting; automated instant third-party integration assumption creates vetting_required for new fintech partners; automated must complete Q2 partner certification before marketplace listing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital banking. PCI-DSS, SOC2, FFIEC, GLBA. OAuth2. US. Financial account and banking transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Digital banking. PCI-DSS, FFIEC, GLBA. OAuth2. US. Banking account and financial data.
